source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/250411 SKD 인도 - Blue/SKD india 250530/5.5 Essential Principles check list/A-TCF-6-153 General Safety and Performance Requirements Checklist (rev.3).docx

document.title: Checklist for the General Safety and Performance Requirements
document.documentType: General Safety and Performance Requirements checklist
standards: MDR Article 83, Post-market surveillance system of the manufacturer

sourceSummary.oneLine: Checklist mapping MDR General Safety and Performance Requirements to applicable standards, methods, and controlled supporting documents.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports technical documentation by recording applicability, relevant standards, method used, and references to controlled documents for MDR GSPR compliance.
keyPoints: Prepared, reviewed, and approved on May 30, 2025 by H&abyz Co., Ltd. personnel.
Applicable requirements are mapped to risk management, safety testing, EMC, RED, software validation, biocompatibility, usability, clinical evaluation, labeling, and user manual evidence.
Several MDR Annex I sections are marked not applicable, including Annex XVI, sterilisation, medicinal substances, biological origin, radiation, lay-person use, and implantable-device requirements.
The device is described as a digital imaging solution for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy and for radiologist use only.

concepts.name: Risk management system
concepts.evidence: Manufacturers shall establish, implement, document and maintain a risk management system.

concepts.evidence: MDR Article 83, Post-market surveillance system of the manufacturer

evidence.claim: The document is a checklist for General Safety and Performance Requirements.
evidence.evidenceText: Checklist for the General Safety and Performance Requirements
evidence.pageTarget: General Safety and Performance Requirements Checklist

evidence.claim: The document was prepared, reviewed, and approved on May 30, 2025.
evidence.evidenceText: Prepared by Han, Jimin R&D team May 30, 2025 Reviewed by Kim, Myeongseop R&D Manager May 30, 2025 Approved by Hur, Namkyu Quality Manager May 30, 2025

evidence.claim: The manufacturer identified in the checklist is H&abyz Co., Ltd. in Yongin-si, Republic of Korea.
evidence.evidenceText: H&abyz Co., Ltd. 2-Dong, 41-16, Cheoinseong-ro, Namsa-eup, Cheoin-gu, Yongin-si, Gyeonggi-do, 17118, Republic of Korea

evidence.claim: The checklist uses MDR Article 61 for clinical evaluation evidence.
The checklist uses MDR Article 83 for post-market surveillance evidence.
evidence.evidenceText: MDR Article 83, Post-market surveillance system of the manufacturer

evidence.claim: Risk management is supported by EN ISO 14971:2019 and a Risk Management file.
evidence.evidenceText: EN ISO 14971:2019 Risk Management Risk Management file

evidence.claim: Software requirements are supported by EN 62304:2006, MDCG 2019-16, software development and validation documentation, and risk management.
evidence.evidenceText: EN 62304:2006 MDCG 2019-16 EN ISO 14971:2019 Software Development & Validation report Risk Management Software Development plan Software Validation report Risk Management file

evidence.claim: The device is described as a digital imaging solution for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy.
evidence.evidenceText: The device is indicated as a digital imaging solution designed for providing the general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy.

evidence.claim: The device is identified as intended for radiologist use only and not designed for lay persons.
evidence.evidenceText: The device is not designed for lay persons, not applicable. Radiologist use only.

evidence.claim: The device is not listed in MDR Annex XVI according to the checklist.
evidence.evidenceText: This device is not listed in Annex XVI, not applicable.

evidence.claim: The checklist states the device is non-sterile and not intended for sterilisation.
evidence.evidenceText: This device is not intended for sterilisation.

evidence.claim: The checklist states the device does not emit radiation.
evidence.evidenceText: This device is not emitted radiation.

evidence.claim: Labeling and IFU requirements are supported by EN ISO 20417:2021 and EN ISO 15223-1:2021.
evidence.evidenceText: EN ISO 20417:2021 EN ISO 15223-1:2021 Providing User manual and label with appropriate symbols and correct usage. Label and packaging specification User Manual

evidence.claim: The checklist references RED testing under Directive 2014/53/EU.
The device depends on an internal power supply according to the checklist.
evidence.evidenceText: The device depends on an internal power supply.
